ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "european_size" TEXT /* European size standard */,
  "bust_measurement" INTEGER /* Bust measurement in centimeters */,
  "under_bust_measurement" INTEGER /* Under bust measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist_measurement" INTEGER /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "hip_measurement" INTEGER /* Hip measurement in centimeters */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the size */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., women's, men's, kids', etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing brand */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the brand is based */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the customer is based */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_registered" TEXT /* Date when the customer registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "bust" INTEGER /* Bust measurement in centimeters */,
  "under_bust" INTEGER /* Under bust measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "hip" INTEGER /* Hip measurement in centimeters */,
  "date_taken" TEXT /* Date when the measurements were taken */,
  "measurement_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the measurements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brand_size_mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the standard size */,
  "brand_size" TEXT /* Size name used by the brand */,
  "size_equivalent" TEXT /* Size equivalent in standard measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brand_size_mappings_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brand_size_mappings_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* Image URL of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the purchase was made */,
  "purchase_status" TEXT /* Status of the purchase (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "recommended_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended size */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_recommended_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purchase */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was returned */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., pending, processed, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_purchase_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_id") REFERENCES purchases ("purchase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommendation */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the customer */,
  "date_given" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was given */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., size, fit, quality, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_recommendation_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommendation_id") REFERENCES size_recommendations ("recommendation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the analytics data was collected */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric being tracked (e.g., sales, returns, customer satisfaction, etc.) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model (e.g., neural network, decision tree, etc.) */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the machine learning model */,
  "model_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was trained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
